flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Southern Maine rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.9k → $27.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Southern Maine rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.9k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Southern Maine fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Southern Maine rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (20.3% → 25.5%).
